hypotheses.name: L11 Community Differential Analysis (B-cell vs non-B-cell)
hypotheses.method: Recompute k=10 kNN greedy-modularity 2-community partition at L11 for 195 in-vocab genes. Differential analysis: PC1 projection (Mann-Whitney), L2 norm, STRING degree, TF Fisher-exact enrichment, expanded B-cell (n=9) and T-cell (n=8) marker Fisher-exact enrichment per community.
hypotheses.primary_metric: B-cell marker Fisher exact p-value in Community 1
hypotheses.result_value: OR=10.60, p=0.0080; 9/9 B-cell markers in Community 1; PC1 comm0=+1.653 vs comm1=-2.010 (p<1e-9)
hypotheses.next_action: Characterize Community 0 subcommunities (T-cell vs myeloid) using k=15 partition. Track B-cell community purity emergence across layers.

hypotheses.name: Community Partition Stability: k-sweep and Layer Sweep
hypotheses.method: ARI (Adjusted Rand Index) between L11 k=10 reference partition and: (a) same-layer kNN at k in {5,10,15,20,25,30}; (b) k=10 partition at each layer L0-L11. Spearman rho(layer, ARI_vs_L11).
hypotheses.primary_metric: ARI vs L11 k=10 partition at k=15-30
hypotheses.result_value: ARI=0.77-0.90 for k=15-30; Spearman rho(layer,ARI)=0.427 p=0.167; L11 uniquely has 2 communities (others 3-4)
hypotheses.next_action: Track B-cell community purity across layers to understand when B-cell community consolidates. Test if 3-community partitions contain T-cell and myeloid splits.
hypotheses.note: H02 replaced from planned Dorothea activation/repression split (Dorothea files lack sign/mor column). File named h02_dorothea_activation_repression_decay.json but contains community stability data.

hypotheses.name: PC1 Polarity Expanded Gene Sets — B-cell Stable Across All Layers
hypotheses.method: SVD per layer on 195 in-vocab genes. Project to PC1. Mann-Whitney test: B-cell markers (n=10 in 195-vocab), T-cell (n=15), myeloid (n=6), TFs (n=59) at respective PC1 poles. Background = all 195 genes. Repeat for all 12 layers.
hypotheses.primary_metric: B-cell marker PC1-negative AUROC p-value across all layers
hypotheses.result_value: B-cell mean_PC1=-1.908 vs bg=+0.103 at L11 (p=0.0014); p<0.01 at ALL 12 layers (min p=0.001 at L5-L6); T-cell not enriched at any layer
hypotheses.next_action: Cross-model validation: test if Geneformer embeddings show the same B-cell/PC1-negative axis. Test PC2 and PC3 for T-cell or myeloid signal.
